ceoMessage.subtitle: A Message from Our CEO
ceoMessage.name: Omar Albelbisy
ceoMessage.content: "Soon after the Kingdom's industrial revolution started, our establishment began working in the field of industrial equipment trade to play an important role in the industrial development in Saudi Arabia. Since our founding, we have been committed to delivering unparalleled quality and service to our partners across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, ensuring that your business has the reliable resources it needs for factories, lathes, and maintenance workshops."

query.title: Send Us a Query
query.description: Have a question or need a custom quote? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you promptly.

about.title: About Us
about.whoWeAreP1: Omar Khattab AlBelbisy Trading Est. is one of the leading institutions in the field of industrial equipment trading in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Soon after the Kingdom's industrial revolution started, our establishment began working in this field to play an important role in the industrial development of the Kingdom.
about.whoWeAreP2: Taking into account the requirements of the industrial market for factories, lathes, and equipment for forming and maintenance workshops, our extensive inventory encompasses a diverse selection of metals including brass and copper bars, as well as sheets. We also provide engineering plastics such as PA6 and PTFE imported from Germany. Additionally, we offer a wide array of hand taps, dies, lathe parts, and tools imported from Poland, available in various sizes to meet your specific needs.

quality.title: Uncompromising Quality
quality.desc: We rigorously vet all our manufacturing partners to ensure every product meets global standards of excellence.

partnerships.title: Trusted Partnerships
partnerships.desc: We build long-term relationships based on transparency, reliability, and mutual growth with our clients.

growth.title: Sustainable Growth
growth.desc: Our vision focuses on sustainable industrial development, providing solutions that stand the test of time.

about.quote: Our mission is not just to supply equipment, but to empower industries across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to build a better, more efficient world.

milestones.title: Foundation
milestones.desc: Started as a small local distributor for industrial tools.

milestones.desc: Expanded our catalogue to include raw materials and machinery.

milestones.title: Global Network
milestones.desc: Established partnerships with top-tier manufacturers across Europe and Asia.
